content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.8 WARN — LoginView.swift uses only GoogleSignIn (`App/LoginView.swift:1,13`) with no `ASAuthorizationAppleID` implementation, and description.txt advertises "One-tap Google sign-in" as a headline feature with no Apple alternative.
Pierre: Guideline 4.8 requires that apps offering third-party social login (here, Google Sign-In) also offer Sign in with Apple as an equivalent option, unless a documented exemption applies (e.g., enterprise-only or education account). No exemption pattern is evident here — this is a consumer recipe app targeting general users — so this will very likely trigger an App Review rejection. Add a "Sign in with Apple" button alongside the Google option before submission.
